hints.enabled: Enable or disable process monitoring for this entry.
hints.threads: Number of entries to check in parallel.
hints.process: Process name to search for (case-insensitive). If empty, the item key is used.
hints.min_count: Minimum number of running instances required to report OK. Module-level value is the global default; per-item value of 0 means use the global default.

rename_item_prompt: Enter new process name or identifier:

ui.discover_error: Could not load the list of running processes
